chapters.lead: Some things are worth counting. Not out of obsession ‚Äî but because each number is a tiny piece of a story.

beats.title: Messages
beats.subtitle: Little ways of finding each other
beats.narrative: 6,354 messages. Each one a thread in the fabric of an entire year. A word here, a laugh there ‚Äî small moments that quietly built something extraordinary.

beats.title: Days Together
beats.subtitle: Even when apart, never distant
beats.narrative: Out of 365 days, conversation never really stopped. 17.4 messages a day on average ‚Äî not because you had to talk, but because you wanted to.

beats.title: Reels Shared
beats.subtitle: A language of their own
beats.narrative: 116 reels passed between you. Little dispatches that said "this made me think of you" ‚Äî maybe the quietest way of saying the biggest thing.

beats.title: Shared Moments
beats.subtitle: More than just words
beats.narrative: 358 photos, videos, and audio notes. Because sometimes words aren't enough, and sometimes a voice or a picture carries everything that text cannot.

chapters.lead: Every relationship has a rhythm. A shape. A season. This is what yours looked like from above.

beats.title: Your Rhythm
beats.subtitle: The pulse of a year
beats.narrative: Your conversations had their own gentle cadence ‚Äî sometimes a flood of words, sometimes a quiet trickle. But never silence. Never distance. Just the steady hum of two people staying close.

beats.title: September
beats.subtitle: The month you couldn't stop talking
beats.narrative: September was when the words spilled out fastest. Maybe it was the season. Maybe it was something in the air. But something about that month made you both reach for each other more.

beats.title: Longest Silence
beats.subtitle: Even the quiet meant something
beats.narrative: The longest stretch without talking was 3288 hours. In a year of thousands of messages, that's remarkable ‚Äî and says more than any word count ever could.

chapters.lead: Every couple develops their own language. Inside jokes. Shorthand. A private dictionary that only two people in the world understand.

beats.title: Your Emoji Language
beats.subtitle: ¬©¬Æ ‚Äî a private vocabulary
beats.narrative: When words failed, ¬© stepped in. And ¬Æ. And . A tiny visual language that no one else would read the same way.

beats.title: Short & Sweet
beats.subtitle: When less says more
beats.narrative: 72% of your messages were short ‚Äî under thirty characters. A quick "okiee," a single emoji, a word that only makes sense to the two of you.

beats.title: Words Between You
beats.subtitle: Every message a small gift
beats.narrative: On average, your messages were 27 characters long. Not too much, not too little. Just enough.

chapters.lead: Somehow, early evening always became yours. The world got quiet, and your conversation came alive.

beats.title: The 6PM Hour
beats.subtitle: When the world fell away
beats.narrative: 6PM. early evening. That was your hour. When distractions faded and conversations deepened. When reels, thoughts, and quiet confessions found their way across the distance between you.

beats.title: Night Owls
beats.subtitle: The hours that held you together
beats.narrative: The patterns trace themselves across days and nights. You belonged to the quiet hours ‚Äî when the rest of the world was asleep and there was only each other's words on the screen.

chapters.lead: Some messages are numbers in a spreadsheet. Others are little monuments ‚Äî moments worth pulling out and holding up to the light.
